REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JUPITER COLONY, LLC, BRAND NAPA VALLEY, LLC, EDWARD FITTS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF TO STATE A PRESENT ACTUAL CONTROVERSY THAT DOES NOT INVOLVE PAST WRONGS/BREACHED FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF HAS AN ADEQUATE REMEDY AT ALL, E.G. A DECLARATION OF PARTIES' RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE CONTRACT GOING FORWARD. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION AND CONCEALMENT ARE NOT DUPLICATIVE OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION. DELAYED DISCOVERY IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO TIMELY FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT SHALL FILE AN ANSWER WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER IN RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT WITHOUT A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-10-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT JUPITER COLONY, LLC, BRAND NAPA VALLEY, LLC, EDWARD FITTS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for the cause of action for declaratory relief to state a present actual controversy that does not involve past wrongs/breached for which Plaintiff has an adequate remedy at all, e.g. a declaration of parties' rights and obligations under the contract going forward. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Causes of action for negligent misrepresentation and concealment are not duplicative of the cause of action for intentional misrepresentation. Delayed discovery is sufficiently alleged. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. If Plaintiff fails to timely file an amended complaint, Defendant shall file an answer within 20 days of notice of entry of this order in response to the complaint without a cause of action for declaratory relief.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Continued To May-10-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

DEFENDANT JUPITER COLONY, LLC, BRAND NAPA VALLEY, LLC AND EDWARD FITTS' DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Transferred to Department 501 to be heard on May 10, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Opposing party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than April 29, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
